summary: Iteration 12: Multiple UI improvements testing - ALL TESTS PASSED. Tested mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080) for: How It Works CTA button, Service Areas scroll fix, City page breadcrumbs, intro card animations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Key test selectors: data-testid='how-it-works-book-online-cta' (CTA button), data-testid='city-back-button' (Back button), data-testid='how-it-works-mobile-step-{1-4}' (mobile steps). Service Areas scroll uses scrollToAnchor() with retry mechanism for lazy-loaded sections.

TEST_1_HowItWorks_Step1_CTA.details: Red oval CTA button with stars and glow found on step 1 (data-testid='how-it-works-book-online-cta'). Border-radius: 9999px (oval), 2 star SVGs, ctaGlow animation 2s infinite alternate.

TEST_2_Steps_2_4_No_CTA.details: Steps 2, 3, 4 do NOT have the CTA button (verified via data-testid selectors)

TEST_3_Intro_Cards_Animation.details: 3 intro cards with 'intro-card' class found. Staggered animation delays: 0ms, 150ms, 300ms

TEST_4_ctaGlow_Animation.details: ctaGlow keyframe animation exists in CSS. Applied to CTA button with animation: 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate

TEST_5_Mobile_ServiceAreas_Scroll.details: Clicking 'Service Areas' in hamburger menu closes menu and scrolls to #service-area section (scroll position changed from 0 to 5337, section in viewport)

TEST_6_City_Page_Back_Hidden.details: Back button (data-testid='city-back-button') is HIDDEN on mobile (has 'hidden md:inline-flex' classes)

TEST_1_Areas_Dropdown_Scroll.details: Clicking 'View service area map' in Areas dropdown scrolls to #service-area section (scroll position changed from 0 to 5254)

TEST_2_City_Breadcrumbs_Structure.details: Breadcrumbs show: Home (with icon) / Service Areas / CityName. Forward slashes present. Links work: href='/' and href='/service-areas'

TEST_3_City_Back_Button_Visible.details: Back button visible on desktop (data-testid='city-back-button'). Correctly has 'hidden md:inline-flex' for responsive hiding

verified_features: 1. How It Works mobile step 1: Red oval CTA button with star SVGs and ctaGlow animation
2. Steps 2-4: No CTA button (only step 1 has it)
3. Mobile Service Areas hamburger menu link: Closes menu + scrolls to #service-area
4. Desktop Areas dropdown 'View service area map': Scrolls to #service-area
5. City page breadcrumbs: Home icon / Service Areas / CityName with working links
6. City page Back button: Visible on desktop (md:inline-flex), hidden on mobile
7. Intro cards: Staggered entrance animations (0ms, 150ms, 300ms delays)
8. ctaGlow keyframe animation: Exists in App.css and applied to CTA button
